auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again shortly.

errors.forbiddenBody: You don't have permission to access this page.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Create your first WhatsApp agent in minutes. You can change everything later.
onboarding.agentsCount: {count, plural, one {# agent} other {# agents}} — draft
onboarding.stepCreateDesc: Name, languages and personality of your assistant.
onboarding.stepPersonalizeDesc: Tune the tone, simulate a conversation for free.
onboarding.stepActivateDesc: Bring your agent online for your customers.

wizard.identityLead: Let's start with the basics: its name and the languages it will speak to your customers.
wizard.name: Agent name
wizard.languagesHint: The agent replies in the customer's language. Personality is written per language.
wizard.personalityLead: Describe its role in a few words — we turn it into clear instructions. Settings per language.
wizard.advancedHint: editable · overrides guided mode for this language
wizard.leadHint: Fields the agent will try to collect (lead).
wizard.createError: Creation failed. Check the fields and try again.

simulate.title: Chat with your agent
simulate.lead: Test its behavior like a real customer. Edit the personality in the previous step if needed.
simulate.freeBadge: Free simulation — platform keys, Haiku model. No quota consumption.

success.title: Your agent is ready
success.subtitle: "{name}" is created as a draft. It does not receive customers yet — connect it to WhatsApp then activate it.
success.connectDesc: Link your WhatsApp Business number to bring the agent online.
